title: Sink Protector Mat, 2 Pack Kitchen Sink Mat Draining Board Cuttable Clear PVC Sink Dish Drying Mat Pebble Pattern Water Tank Filter for Ceramic Stainless Steel Sinks, Fast Draining Cut-to-Fit (30x40)
features: ✔ Pebble Pattern Anti-Scratch Protection：3mm thick PVC cushions impacts from pots/pans—prevents scratches on ceramic, stainless steel, and vintage sinks (acts as sink saver for daily use)
✔ 0.5cm Groove Fast Draining：Raised pebble texture creates drainage gaps—water drains 2x faster than flat mats, no stagnant water or mold (ideal as sink drainer mat)
✔ Cut-to-Fit Any Sink Size：Trims easily with scissors to fit irregular sinks (small undermount, double sinks)—full coverage with no gaps (replaces sink liner mat)
✔ 4-In-1 Multi-Use Design：Works as sink protector, dish drainer mat, countertop hot pad (up to 60℃), and camping prep pad—saves space for small kitchens
✔ Renter & Camper Friendly：No adhesive/drilling (landlord-approved); 220g/piece lightweight (fits camping backpacks); easy to clean (wipes in 10 seconds with damp cloth)
description: 1. All-Scenario Sink Protection： This 2 pack kitchen sink mat is designed to guard your sink against daily wear—whether it’s a ceramic sink, stainless steel sink, or Belfast sink, the pebble pattern’s 3mm thick PVC layer absorbs impacts from heavy pots and pans, preventing unsightly scratches (no need for separate sink protectors). It also hides minor existing scratches, keeping your sink looking new. 2. Fast Draining Anti-Mold： Say goodbye to stagnant water! The raised pebble texture creates 0.5cm drainage gaps that speed up water flow by 2x compared to flat sink mats—perfect for busy kitchens where standing water leads to mold and odors. Flip it over, and it works as a dish drainer mat, lifting bowls, plates, and mugs above water to avoid water spots. 3. Cut-to-Fit Flexibility： No more struggling with ill-fitting sink mats! At 40×30cm, this mat trims easily with scissors to fit irregular sink shapes—small undermount sinks, double sinks, or even vintage sinks. It provides full coverage with no gaps, acting as a reliable sink liner for any kitchen setup. 4. Multi-Use Space Saver： Ideal for small kitchens, this mat replaces 4 separate tools: sink protector, dish drainer, countertop hot pad (safe for up to 60℃), and fruit/vegetable wash pad. It saves cabinet space and reduces clutter, making it a must-have for compact living spaces. 5. Renter & Camper Ready： Renters love it—no adhesive or drilling means no damage to rental sinks (landlord-approved, no security deposit risk). Campers appreciate its 22 0g lightweight design, which fits easily in camping backpacks; use it as a camp sink mat or food prep pad for outdoor meals. 6. Product Specifications： ◦ Set Quantity: 2PCS ◦ Size: 40×30cm (L×W), trimmable to smaller sizes ◦ Material: Food-grade PVC (non-toxic, odor-free, scratch-resistant) ◦ Thickness: 3mm (impact-resistant) ◦ Drainage Gap: 0.5cm (fast-draining) ◦ Heat Resistance: Up to 60℃ (for countertop use) ◦ Weight: 220g per piece (lightweight for camping) ◦ Key Features: Pebble pattern anti-slip, cut-to-fit, multi-use, easy-clean Disclaimer： Do not use for temperatures exceeding 60℃ (risk of material deformation). Avoid contact with sharp objects (may cause punctures). Not suitable for direct use on open flames or stovetops. Clean with damp cloth or soapy water (do not soak in water for over 24 hours to maintain durability). Keep away from children under 3 to prevent accidental ingestion of small trimmed pieces.
